affinity_json.note: T790M gatekeeper mutation reduces gefitinib binding affinity ~100x compared to wild-type (WT Kd ~2nM). This is consistent with clinical resistance data.

known_limitations: Boltz-2 has ~40% false positive rate for protein-ligand binding poses
Intrinsically disordered regions and flexible loops are poorly modeled
Water molecules and metal ion coordination are not reliably predicted
Predicts single static conformation; proteins are dynamic in reality
Complex (multimer) predictions are less reliable than single-chain
Membrane protein predictions lack lipid bilayer context
Gain-of-function mutations may not show structural changes detectable by prediction
Boltz-2 has ~40% false positive rate for protein-ligand binding poses
trust_audit.training_data_note: Boltz-2 trained primarily on PDB structures, which over-represent well-studied proteins EGFR is well-studied with many PDB structures, so predictions may be more reliable but could overfit to known conformations.
suggested_validation: Low-confidence regions detected. Consider experimental structure determination (X-ray crystallography or cryo-EM) for these regions.
